evals.name: reactive-dialogue-and-coherence
evals.prompt: How do I write dialogue lines that react to events (a character commenting on what just happened) without them feeling redundant or breaking immersion? Also, players aren't investing in my world — the setup feels thin.
evals.expected_output: States the reactive-dialogue rule (a reaction line must reveal something new about world or character or be cut; cut out-of-character lines; keep lines short) and connects world coherence and concrete detail to earning audience investment.
expectations: States the reactive-dialogue rule: a reaction line must reveal something new about world/character or be cut; cut out-of-character lines; keep lines short
Connects world coherence / concrete detail to earning audience investment
